name: Adobe Firefly
enterprise_offering_name: Adobe Firefly for Enterprise (Creative Cloud Enterprise)
data_egress_concerns: Text prompts may describe confidential product designs, packaging concepts, or campaign visuals
Reference images uploaded for style matching may contain proprietary artwork or pre-release branding
Generative Fill and Expand features process portions of existing images through Adobe cloud services
Enterprise customers should verify that Firefly features in Creative Cloud apps route through their tenancy
training_use_default: Adobe states Firefly is trained exclusively on Adobe Stock licensed content and public-domain material. Customer content (prompts, uploads, generated outputs) is not used for training in Enterprise plans. Non-enterprise tiers should verify current opt-out status.
